page: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Edsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 48 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8573C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 260 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX). The server is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It also includes 5669 GB of bundled local storage and supports Premium Storage.

In benchmark evaluations, the E96ds_v6 demonstrates top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, particularly for large block read and write operations, placing in the top 10% of tested systems. Multi-threaded processing capabilities are strong, as evidenced by top-tier results in Passmark CPU tests, including physics, encryption, and extended instructions. Database performance is highly competitive, with Redis SET operations achieving 122.52 million operations per second and Passmark database operations ranking in the top 10%. Additionally, the server displays strong capabilities in LLM inference prompt processing and static web serving throughput.

Given its high resource density, the E96ds_v6 offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive enterprise workloads by consolidating large databases and memory-resident applications onto a single instance. The inclusion of 5669 GB of local storage reduces the need for external storage attachments for temporary data. This server is highly suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching layers like Redis, data analytics, and memory-heavy enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by a 96-vCPU Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Featuring 768.0 GB of RAM and 5669 GB of bundled local storage, this instance provides a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Benchmark data highlights top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, database operations, and multi-threaded CPU execution, with Redis SET operations reaching 122.52 million operations per second. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX, enhancing its capability for vector and matrix calculations. The architecture includes 260 MB of L3 cache and dedicated CPU allocation, ensuring stable performance under sustained multi-threaded execution. This server is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data-heavy enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v6 is a memory-optimized server with 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, and 5669 GB local storage, delivering top-tier database and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v6 is a memory-optimized server featuring 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 768 GB of RAM, and 5669 GB of local storage.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and substantial bundled local storage for demanding database workloads.

768.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per vCPU
5669 GB of bundled local SSD storage
Top-tier memory bandwidth and database benchmark performance
Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction set support
Optimized for large-scale databases and in-memory caching
